title: 10 best herbal teas for inflamed gums
description: Dandelion teas helps with inflamed gums because of its potent anti-inflammatory properties. The tea's flavonoids, such as quercetin and kaempferol, have been shown to reduce inflammation and alleviate gum pain. Additionally, the tea's antioxidants help to combat oxidative stress, which can contribute to gum inflammation. As a natural diuretic, dandelion tea also helps to reduce swelling and ease bleeding in the gums, promoting healthy oral tissue and a reduced risk of periodontal disea...
